data.title: Jotform's EdTech report: 65% educators use AI to bridge resource gaps, facing platform fatigue and integration issues.
data.description: According to Jotform's EdTech Trends 2026 report, 65% of teachers are utilizing artificial intelligence to address resource deficiencies, despite facing obstacles such as platform fatigue and inadequate system integration. The report, released from San Francisco on January 20, 2026, highlights the widespread adoption of AI among educators to enhance productivity in the education sector. Jotform, a prominent form and no-code automation platform, conducted the study, emphasizing the importance of leveraging technology to overcome challenges in the education field.

data.title: American Water's 2025 fourth quarter & year-end financial results to be released on Feb 18, 2026, conference call on Feb 19.
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on January 20, 2026, American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. John Griffith, the President and Chief Executive Officer of the company, will likely provide insights into the numbers and performance of the company during this period. This announcement suggests a significant financial disclosure from the NYSE-listed company, which would be of interest to investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Linnworks introduces AI tool Spotlight to aid online retailers automate operations, reduce risk, and make data-driven decisions. Launches Jan 20.
data.description: UK-based Linnworks has introduced Spotlight AI as part of its Commerce Ops Intelligence portfolio, aiming to support retailers in automating routine tasks, managing risk, and enhancing decision-making through data analysis. This AI-powered offering will be accessible to all Linnworks customers from January 20. Spotlight AI is designed to streamline operations and aid scalability by harnessing data-driven insights.

data.title: Skilled labor shortage is top challenge per 79% of manufacturing executives, new CADDi research reveals. Industry trends also discussed.
data.description: In Chicago, industry experts discuss key trends affecting manufacturing. They address labor shortages, data use, and digital transformation. Leaders emphasize the importance of adapting to these changes in order to stay competitive in the sector.

data.title: Legion WFM and Rebus partner to improve warehouse labor efficiency. Integration of Rebus' LMS with Legion's AI-driven software will help reduce costs and enhance operations.
data.description: Legion Technologies and Rebus have joined forces to enhance workforce management in warehouses. The collaboration between the two companies will integrate Rebus’ real-time warehouse analytics and labor management system with Legion’s AI-based labor forecasting and scheduling. This integration will ensure seamless alignment between operational data and labor plans, ultimately improving labor efficiency and cutting costs for warehouses. This partnership aims to optimize warehouse operations by linking planning with execution, resulting in enhanced productivity and overall effectiveness.

data.title: Merchant appoints Clayton Chandler as Chief Data Officer to lead data and AI strategy, enhancing use of data as a strategic asset.
data.description: In a recent announcement from New York, it was revealed that Clayton Chandler has been appointed as the Chief Data Officer at Merchant. With this new position, Chandler is set to spearhead the enterprise data and artificial intelligence strategy for Merchant. This move aims to enhance the company's utilization of data as a strategic resource within its expanding network of partner firms. Chandler comes with a wealth of experience in assisting financial services companies in optimizing data usage to bolster decision-making processes, enhance operational efficiency, and provide improved services to customers.

data.title: Kapfenberger SV 1919 partners with Vestible, a US-based sports investment platform for potential future sale.
data.description: An investment partnership has been revealed between Kapfenberger SV 1919 (“KSV 1919”) in Austria and Vestible in Kansas City, Missouri. Vestible, a sports investment platform, offers a unique opportunity for public investment in a club’s potential future sale. This partnership will introduce a structured investment opportunity linked to a possible future sale outcome. Institutional and individual investors will have a novel method to purchase, retain, and trade a sports investment. This innovative model is designed to provide a new financial avenue in the sports industry.

data.title: Patra unveils advancements in AI platform for insurance, including support for CPP, AI enhancements, subscription pricing.
data.description: In El Dorado Hills, California, Patra, a prominent company offering AI-powered software solutions and tech-enabled insurance outsourcing services, recently revealed significant advancements for its Patra AI platform. These include pioneering assistance for Commercial Package policies, enhancements in AI model performance, introduction of monthly subscription pricing, and the addition of new operational reporting features. Patra AI, the company's exclusive insurance automation platform, utilizes cutting-edge AI technology and contemporary workflow processes.

data.title: MNTN in top 50 Best Places to Work for 3rd year in a row per Ad Age's 2026 list, recognized for benefits and culture.
data.description: In New York, MNTN (NYSE: MNTN) has been recognized as one of the top companies to work for, landing a spot on the prestigious 2026 Ad Age Best Places to Work list. The ranking, released on Jan. 20 on AdAge.com, evaluates companies based on various criteria such as compensation, benefits, corporate environment, and management style. MNTN's inclusion among the 50 winners highlights its commitment to providing an exemplary work experience. Known for their innovative technology platform that focuses on performance marketing in Connected TV, MNTN distinguishes itself as the Hardest Working Software provider in the industry.

data.title: Boar's Head launches Greek yogurt dessert dips with three flavors to offer a healthier snacking indulgence.
data.description: Boar's Head Brand®, a top provider of deli foods in the US, is introducing three new dessert-inspired flavors for snack enthusiasts to enjoy in a healthier manner. Set to launch on Jan. 20, 2026, this innovative line aims to cater to those looking for a more wholesome way to indulge. By offering options to dip, share, and celebrate, individuals will have a guilt-free treat to savor. This initiative showcases the brand's commitment to providing quality and flavorful products, satisfying cravings without compromising on nutrition.

data.title: Scope API 2.0 offers full-structure measurements plus property intelligence like project pricing and tax rates.
data.description: Get immediate access to comprehensive measurements for roofing, siding, gutters, paint, concrete, insulation, and blueprints. Also included are project retail price estimates, material lists, municipality contact details, tax rates, building codes, permits, zoning information, weather history, and property financial data, all in one convenient platform.

data.title: Securus Technologies and Florida Cares collaborate to support children of incarcerated parents in Florida in 2026.
data.description: In Miramar, Florida, on January 20, 2026, Securus Technologies renews its dedication to enhancing family bonds and aiding children affected by incarceration in Florida. Teaming up with Florida Cares Charity Corporation, Securus...

data.title: Orion Innovation ranked among top 12 providers in Forrester Wave evaluation for Connected Product Engineering Services in Q4 2025.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Iselin, New Jersey, Orion Innovation revealed that it has been recognized as one of the top 12 providers in The Forrester Wave™: Connected Product Engineering Services, Q4 2025. Orion is a prominent software engineering company specializing in Data and AI-driven solutions. This acknowledgment positions Orion as a major player in the industry, highlighting its expertise and innovation in connected product engineering services.

data.title: AI Era Corp. (AERA) invests in AITV Technologies Inc., launching "AITV Channels" powered by UFilm.ai.
data.description: A significant development has been announced by AI Era Corp. (AERA), detailing a strategic investment in AITV Technologies Inc. This investment is poised to facilitate the launch of cutting-edge "AITV Channels" driven by the innovative UFilm.ai technology. This move highlights the commitment of AERA towards integrating AI and advanced technologies into the media industry. The collaboration between AERA and AITV Technologies Inc. is anticipated to revolutionize the media landscape, providing enhanced viewing experiences for audiences. This strategic partnership signifies the growing significance of AI in the media sector, with a focus on leveraging technology to create next-generation entertainment options.

data.title: Bigbank AS extends Mart Veskimägi's term as board member for 3 years until Feb 5, 2029, approved on Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, the supervisory board of Bigbank AS made a decision to prolong Mart Veskimägi's term as a member of the management board for another 3 years. This extension will begin at the end of Veskimägi's current term and will continue until February 5, 2029.
Treasury Secretary Bessent says the U.S. government will add seized Bitcoin to its digital asset reserve.
US Trade Representative Greer: Government-subsidised services is bigger factor in inflation.

data.title: Accounting undergrad enrollment in U.S. rises for 3rd year, 1 out of 8 business students now choose accounting as major.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of accounting majors among business students in the U.S. has increased significantly. Statistics show that one out of every eight business students is now opting for accounting as their major. This surge in interest has been consistent over the past three years, with the enrollment numbers for accounting undergraduate programs continuing to rise. The growth in accounting majors has surpassed the overall growth rate observed in undergraduate institutions across the country, indicating a strong preference for accounting among students pursuing business studies.
